steps.title: Find the coinciding change
steps.content: The question asks what changed when Don Mateo became a patron of the theater. The passage states that he ceased to write plays and instead took on the role of patron to authors, artists, and managers.

steps.title: Reject details not stated
steps.content: Choice A invents a move outside Madrid. Choice C invents public recognition for a short story. Choice D invents a journalism job. The remaining choice matches the stated change that happened when he became a patron. The answer is B.
